title: rubus hirtus var. psammogenes
intro: Rubus hirtus var. psammogenes, also known as beach raspberry, is a variety of wild raspberry native to the coastal regions of Europe. It possesses medicinal properties due to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. psammogenes include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
